title: Wilds Regrown Api
description: A common API for all WildsRegrown mods.
body:
# WildsRegrown Api

A central library for all wilds regrown projects:
- [Wilds Regrown](https://modrinth.com/mod/wildsregrown)
- [Vanilla+](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilds-regrown-vanilla+)

Without one additional WRG content pack it won't work!
For technical support or questions please visit the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Kr6veDaJDr) server.

## Features:
- Custom world generator
- Flowing water
- Dynamic flora
- Dynamic Trees
- Building block abstracts
- Radial GUI

![fun explorable minecraft world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ltozG6OD/images/c04483d152a00cb58017988ff95bacd9b2994725.jpeg)
